summary: Removed the always-empty keyword_overlap_with_megatrends field from megatrend-map output; updated SKILL.md/README.md/manifest description to match what the command actually returns (two-level related-trend walk).
reason: Output schema advertised a list field that was hardcoded to []; the underlying overlap join isn't implemented. Documenting truth beats shipping a misleading schema. Greptile P2 on PR #548.
